title: Gold Panning
description: Allows turning sand dirt and gravel into useful items
body:
## Description
Gold panning allows turning sand dirt and gravel into useful items, you get unique biome dependent loot and its configurable using a datapack.

### Crafting
4 sticks and 1 bowl.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cacb690a378403753d5af62cf2db4ae319df99d1.png)

### Panning

- Place gold pan
- Fill with water using a bucket
- Fill with a block (sand, red sand, dirt or gravel)
- Right click 4 times

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-56Av6Gaei0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
